title: Term Pregnancy in Labor - Normal Vaginal Delivery
chief_complaint: 28-year-old G2P1 at 40 weeks with regular painful contractions every 3 minutes for 4 hours. Membranes intact. Fetal movement normal. Previous normal vaginal delivery.

physical_exam.cervix: 6cm dilated, 80% effaced, -1 station, vertex presentation, membranes intact

correct_diagnosis: Active Phase of Labor (Term Pregnancy, Vertex Presentation)
key_learning_points: Active labor: regular contractions + cervical change

feedback.correct_message: Well assessed! Normal active labor progressing well.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is normal active labor. Monitor progress with partogram.
feedback.attending_note: Normal labor: Monitor progress with partogram. Intermittent fetal auscultation. Encourage mobilization and hydration. Pain management per patient preference. Active management of third stage with oxytocin 10 IU IM after delivery.
